title: usefulness
description: This plugin will add useful commands like /heal.
body:
Latuna’s Useful Plugin:

This plugin adds nice simple functions like “/heal”.

Permissions:

- uf.heal - adds permission for the /heal command
- uf.feed - adds permission for the /feed command

CURRENT FEATURES:

- /heal
- /feed
- Player-Join-Message

✨This plugin will be updated soon✨

This plugin is currently only avaiable in the version 1.20.x
